title: Sherry Blanquette with Low Carb Crisps
description: This buttery and crisp Algerian dish features a hangover-cure-friendly accompaniment to blanch vegetables in a sherry sauce, topped with low-carb friendly crisps.
instructions: Season chicken with salt and pepper, then coat each breast in olive oil. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast chicken for about 30 minutes or until golden brown and cooked through.

In a saucepan, heat sherry over medium heat. Add heavy cream, bring to a boil, reduce heat to low, stir occasionally, then let simmer until thickened, about 15-20 minutes (do not walk away as it can burn quickly).
Add salt and pepper to taste.
While sauce simmers, preheat oven to 180°C (350°F) for crisps. Place croutons on a baking sheet sprinkled with olive oil. Bake until crispy, about 7-10 minutes.
Serve chicken in plates with thickened sherry sauce drizzled over and topped with baked crisp croutons.
